title: Why SEO Now Requires Distribution
description: AI search pulls from a wider and constantly shifting set of sources, making distribution strategies crucial for SEOs to maintain visibility.

title: A New Kind of Turing Test for Artificial Intelligence
description: A proposal for a new Turing test that evaluates an AI's ability to theorize about its hardware constraints, inspired by a sci-fi story by Stanislaw Lem.

title: MCP vs Skills: Two Approaches to Enabling AI Agents
description: MCP and Skills are two approaches that enable AI agents to interact with external tools and access domain-specific knowledge. While they differ in how they provide information and execute tasks, they both offer ways to extend an AI agent's capabilities.

title: Visa is Ready for AI Agents
description: The next trillion-dollar payments network won't have a checkout page, with machines paying machines in fractions of a cent. Autonomous AI agents will soon conduct far more online transactions than humans.

title: In this tutorial, we implement a Colab-ready version of the AutoResearch…
description: In this tutorial, we implement a Colab-ready version of the AutoResearch framework originally proposed by Andrej Karpathy.

title: The race to establish an AI-free logo
description: Organisations worldwide are racing to develop a universally recognised label for 'human-made' products and services as part of the growing backlash against AI use.
